purpose: Converts vague cycle-phase assessment into practical monitoring indicators for timing the AI cycle transition from expansion to correction
components: Capex/revenue ratio failing to improve for 3+ consecutive quarters
First hyperscaler reporting sequential AI revenue decline
Management language shifting from investment to discipline
Secondary beneficiary basket underperforming by 15%+ threshold
Equal-weighted vs cap-weighted underperformance exceeding 800-1200bp (already active)
current_assessment: Mid-cycle expansion with 1-3 years of runway under modal outcome. Equal-weighted underperformance already active matching Stage 1. No other phase transition indicators triggered. Carry cost of being 12-24 months early on anti-AI positions is the binding constraint.
limitations: Indicators pattern-matched from small sample of prior cycles
Lag between indicator triggering and market repricing is uncertain
Multiple indicators could trigger simultaneously rather than sequentially
Self-funded nature may alter indicator sensitivity vs historical precedents
